---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Scope

- Does this change the C-ABI surface?
- Does this change the `manifest.json` schema?
- Does this affect Android, desktop, or all platforms?

## Additional context

Add mock-ups, diagrams, or references to related issues.
